content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 4, 1), (2, 6, 1), (4, 6, 1), (5, 8, 1), (2, 4, 2), (4, 9, 3), (1, 8, 4), (5, 9, 7), (3, 8, 10), (0, 8, 11), (4, 8, 13), (7, 9, 13), (3, 6, 16), (6, 9, 18), (1, 2, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 2 exactly at time 2.

The edges and their times are:

* (0, 4, 1)
* (2, 6, 1)
* (4, 6, 1)
* (5, 8, 1)
* (2, 4, 2)
* (4, 9, 3)
* (1, 8, 4)
* (5, 9, 7)
* (3, 8, 10)
* (0, 8, 11)
* (4, 8, 13)
* (7, 9, 13)
* (3, 6, 16)
* (6, 9, 18)
* (1, 2, 19)

We will match the nodes based on the time and the node.

* Edge (0, 4, 1) has node 0 and time 1. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (2, 6, 1) has node 2 and time 1. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (4, 6, 1) has node 4 and time 1. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 8, 1) has node 5 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 4, 2) has node 2 and time 2. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 9, 3) has node 4 and time 3. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 8, 4) has node 1 and time 4. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 9, 7) has node 5 and time 7. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 8, 10) has node 3 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 8, 11) has node 0 and time 11. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 8, 13) has node 4 and time 13. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 13) has node 7 and time 13. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 6, 16) has node 3 and time 16. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (6, 9, 18) has node 6 and time 18. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 2, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 2.

The nodes matched are 4, 6, 8, 9, and 19.

Answer: [4, 6, 8, 9, 19]
